entries.title: 47 U.S.C. § 230
entries.scope_note: Federal statutory provision concerning protection for private blocking and screening of offensive material; nationwide federal law, subject to current amendments and court interpretation.
entries.source_authority: Office of the Law Revision Counsel, U.S. House of Representatives
entries.status_note: Official U.S. Code source. Verify current law date shown in the source before legal use.
